name: Slack
description: One way to interact with the Slack platform is its HTTP RPC-based Web API, a collection of methods requiring OAuth 2.0-based user, bot, or workspace tokens blessed with related OAuth scopes.

requests.name: admin_apps_approve
requests.description: Approve an app for installation on a workspace.

requests.name: admin_apps_approved_list
requests.description: List approved apps for an org or workspace.

requests.name: admin_apps_requests_list
requests.description: List app requests for a team/workspace.

requests.name: admin_apps_restrict
requests.description: Restrict an app for installation on a workspace.

requests.name: admin_apps_restricted_list
requests.description: List restricted apps for an org or workspace.

requests.name: admin_conversations_archive
requests.description: Archive a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_convertToPrivate
requests.description: Convert a public channel to a private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_create
requests.description: Create a public or private channel-based conversation.

requests.name: admin_conversations_delete
requests.description: Delete a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_disconnectShared
requests.description: Disconnect a connected channel from one or more workspaces.

requests.name: admin_conversations_ekm_listOriginalConnectedChannelInfo
requests.description: List all disconnected channels—i.e., channels that were once connected to other workspaces and then disconnected—and the corresponding original channel IDs for key revocation with EKM.

requests.name: admin_conversations_getConversationPrefs
requests.description: Get conversation preferences for a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_getTeams
requests.description: Get all the workspaces a given public or private channel is connected to within this Enterprise org.

requests.name: admin_conversations_invite
requests.description: Invite a user to a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_rename
requests.description: Rename a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_restrictAccess_addGroup
requests.description: Add an allowlist of IDP groups for accessing a channel

requests.name: admin_conversations_restrictAccess_listGroups
requests.description: List all IDP Groups linked to a channel

requests.name: admin_conversations_restrictAccess_removeGroup
requests.description: Remove a linked IDP group linked from a private channel

requests.name: admin_conversations_search
requests.description: Search for public or private channels in an Enterprise organization.

requests.name: admin_conversations_setConversationPrefs
requests.description: Set the posting permissions for a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_setTeams
requests.description: Set the workspaces in an Enterprise grid org that connect to a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_conversations_unarchive
requests.description: Unarchive a public or private channel.

requests.name: admin_emoji_add
requests.description: Add an emoji.

requests.name: admin_emoji_addAlias
requests.description: Add an emoji alias.

requests.name: admin_emoji_list
requests.description: List emoji for an Enterprise Grid organization.

requests.name: admin_emoji_remove
requests.description: Remove an emoji across an Enterprise Grid organization

requests.name: admin_emoji_rename
requests.description: Rename an emoji.

requests.name: admin_inviteRequests_approve
requests.description: Approve a workspace invite request.

requests.name: admin_inviteRequests_approved_list
requests.description: List all approved workspace invite requests.

requests.name: admin_inviteRequests_denied_list
requests.description: List all denied workspace invite requests.

requests.name: admin_inviteRequests_deny
requests.description: Deny a workspace invite request.

requests.name: admin_inviteRequests_list
requests.description: List all pending workspace invite requests.

requests.name: admin_teams_admins_list
requests.description: List all of the admins on a given workspace.

requests.name: admin_teams_create
requests.description: Create an Enterprise team.

requests.name: admin_teams_list
requests.description: List all teams on an Enterprise organization

requests.name: admin_teams_owners_list
requests.description: List all of the owners on a given workspace.

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_info
requests.description: Fetch information about settings in a workspace

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_setDefaultChannels
requests.description: Set the default channels of a workspace.

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_setDescription
requests.description: Set the description of a given workspace.

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_setDiscoverability
requests.description: An API method that allows admins to set the discoverability of a given workspace

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_setIcon
requests.description: Sets the icon of a workspace.

requests.name: admin_teams_settings_setName
requests.description: Set the name of a given workspace.

requests.name: admin_usergroups_addChannels

responses.description: Typical error response if the token provided is not associated with an Org Admin or Owner

requests.description: Add one or more default channels to an IDP group.

requests.name: admin_usergroups_addTeams
requests.description: Associate one or more default workspaces with an organization-wide IDP group.

requests.name: admin_usergroups_listChannels

responses.description: Typical error response if the token provided is not associated with an Org Admin or Owner

requests.description: List the channels linked to an org-level IDP group (user group).

requests.name: admin_usergroups_removeChannels

responses.description: Typical error response if the token provided is not associated with an Org Admin or Owner

requests.description: Remove one or more default channels from an org-level IDP group (user group).

requests.name: admin_users_assign
requests.description: Add an Enterprise user to a workspace.

requests.name: admin_users_invite
requests.description: Invite a user to a workspace.

requests.name: admin_users_list
requests.description: List users on a workspace

requests.name: admin_users_remove
requests.description: Remove a user from a workspace.

requests.name: admin_users_session_invalidate
requests.description: Invalidate a single session for a user by session_id

requests.name: admin_users_session_reset
requests.description: Wipes all valid sessions on all devices for a given user

requests.name: admin_users_setAdmin
requests.description: Set an existing guest, regular user, or owner to be an admin user.

requests.name: admin_users_setExpiration
requests.description: Set an expiration for a guest user

requests.name: admin_users_setOwner
requests.description: Set an existing guest, regular user, or admin user to be a workspace owner.

requests.name: admin_users_setRegular
requests.description: Set an existing guest user, admin user, or owner to be a regular user.

requests.name: api_test
requests.description: Checks API calling code.

requests.name: apps_event_authorizations_list
requests.description: Get a list of authorizations for the given event context. Each authorization represents an app installation that the event is visible to.

requests.name: apps_permissions_info

responses.description: Standard success response when used with a user token
Standard failure response when used with an invalid token

requests.description: Returns list of permissions this app has on a team.

requests.name: apps_permissions_request

responses.description: Standard success response when used with a user token
Standard failure response when trigger_id is invalid

requests.description: Allows an app to request additional scopes

requests.name: apps_permissions_resources_list
requests.description: Returns list of resource grants this app has on a team.

requests.name: apps_permissions_scopes_list
requests.description: Returns list of scopes this app has on a team.

requests.name: apps_permissions_users_list
requests.description: Returns list of user grants and corresponding scopes this app has on a team.

requests.name: apps_permissions_users_request

responses.description: Standard success response when used with a user token
Standard failure response when trigger_id is invalid

requests.description: Enables an app to trigger a permissions modal to grant an app access to a user access scope.

requests.name: apps_uninstall
requests.description: Uninstalls your app from a workspace.

requests.name: auth_revoke
requests.description: Revokes a token.

requests.name: auth_test

responses.description: Standard success response when used with a user token
Standard failure response when used with an invalid token

requests.description: Checks authentication & identity.

requests.name: bots_info

responses.description: When successful, returns bot info by bot ID.
When no bot can be found, it returns an error.

requests.description: Gets information about a bot user.

requests.name: calls_add
requests.description: Registers a new Call.

requests.name: calls_end
requests.description: Ends a Call.

requests.name: calls_info
requests.description: Returns information about a Call.

requests.name: calls_participants_add
requests.description: Registers new participants added to a Call.

requests.name: calls_participants_remove
requests.description: Registers participants removed from a Call.

requests.name: calls_update
requests.description: Updates information about a Call.

requests.name: chat_delete
requests.description: Deletes a message.

requests.name: chat_deleteScheduledMessage

responses.description: Typical error response if no message is found

requests.description: Deletes a pending scheduled message from the queue.

requests.name: chat_getPermalink

responses.description: Error response when channel cannot be found

requests.description: Retrieve a permalink URL for a specific extant message

requests.name: chat_meMessage
requests.description: Share a me message into a channel.

requests.name: chat_postEphemeral
requests.description: Sends an ephemeral message to a user in a channel.

requests.name: chat_postMessage

responses.description: Typical error response if too many attachments are included

requests.description: Sends a message to a channel.

requests.name: chat_scheduleMessage

responses.description: Typical error response if the `post_at` is invalid (ex. in the past or too far into the future)

requests.description: Schedules a message to be sent to a channel.

requests.name: chat_scheduledMessages_list

responses.description: Typical error response if the channel passed is invalid

requests.description: Returns a list of scheduled messages.

requests.name: chat_unfurl
requests.description: Provide custom unfurl behavior for user-posted URLs

requests.name: chat_update
requests.description: Updates a message.

requests.name: conversations_archive
requests.description: Archives a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_close
requests.description: Closes a direct message or multi-person direct message.

requests.name: conversations_create

responses.description: If successful, the command returns a rather stark [conversation object](/types/conversation)
Typical error response when name already in use

requests.description: Initiates a public or private channel-based conversation

requests.name: conversations_history

responses.description: Typical success response containing a channel's messages

requests.description: Fetches a conversation's history of messages and events.

requests.name: conversations_info

responses.description: Typical success response for a public channel. (Also, a response from a private channel and a multi-party IM is very similar to this example.)
Typical error response when a channel cannot be found

requests.description: Retrieve information about a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_invite

responses.description: Typical success response when an invitation is extended
Typical error response when an invite is attempted on a conversation type that does not support it

requests.description: Invites users to a channel.

requests.name: conversations_join

responses.description: Typical error response if the conversation is archived and cannot be joined

requests.description: Joins an existing conversation.

requests.name: conversations_kick

responses.description: Typical error response when you attempt to kick yourself from a channel

requests.description: Removes a user from a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_leave

responses.description: Typical error response when attempting to leave a workspace's "general" channel

requests.description: Leaves a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_list

responses.description: Typical success response with only public channels

requests.description: Lists all channels in a Slack team.

requests.name: conversations_mark
requests.description: Sets the read cursor in a channel.

requests.name: conversations_members

responses.description: Typical error response when an invalid cursor is provided

requests.description: Retrieve members of a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_open
requests.description: Opens or resumes a direct message or multi-person direct message.

requests.name: conversations_rename

responses.description: Typical error response when the calling user is not a member of the conversation

requests.description: Renames a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_replies
requests.description: Retrieve a thread of messages posted to a conversation

requests.name: conversations_setPurpose
requests.description: Sets the purpose for a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_setTopic
requests.description: Sets the topic for a conversation.

requests.name: conversations_unarchive
requests.description: Reverses conversation archival.

requests.name: dialog_open

responses.description: Typical success response is quite minimal.
Typical error response, before getting to any possible validation errors.

requests.description: Open a dialog with a user

requests.name: dnd_endDnd
requests.description: Ends the current user's Do Not Disturb session immediately.

requests.name: dnd_endSnooze
requests.description: Ends the current user's snooze mode immediately.

requests.name: dnd_info
requests.description: Retrieves a user's current Do Not Disturb status.

requests.name: dnd_setSnooze
requests.description: Turns on Do Not Disturb mode for the current user, or changes its duration.

requests.name: dnd_teamInfo
requests.description: Retrieves the Do Not Disturb status for up to 50 users on a team.

requests.name: emoji_list
requests.description: Lists custom emoji for a team.

requests.name: files_comments_delete

responses.description: Standard success response is very simple
Standard failure response when used with an invalid token

requests.description: Deletes an existing comment on a file.

requests.name: files_delete
requests.description: Deletes a file.

requests.name: files_info
requests.description: Gets information about a file.

requests.name: files_list
requests.description: List for a team, in a channel, or from a user with applied filters.

requests.name: files_remote_add
requests.description: Adds a file from a remote service

requests.name: files_remote_info
requests.description: Retrieve information about a remote file added to Slack

requests.name: files_remote_list
requests.description: Retrieve information about a remote file added to Slack

requests.name: files_remote_remove
requests.description: Remove a remote file.

requests.name: files_remote_share
requests.description: Share a remote file into a channel.

requests.name: files_remote_update
requests.description: Updates an existing remote file.

requests.name: files_revokePublicURL
requests.description: Revokes public/external sharing access for a file

requests.name: files_sharedPublicURL
requests.description: Enables a file for public/external sharing.

requests.name: files_upload

responses.description: Success response after uploading a file to a channel with an initial message

requests.description: Uploads or creates a file.

requests.name: migration_exchange

responses.description: Typical success response when mappings exist for the specified user IDs
Typical error response when there are no mappings to provide

requests.description: For Enterprise Grid workspaces, map local user IDs to global user IDs

requests.name: oauth_access

responses.description: Successful user token negotiation for a single scope

requests.description: Exchanges a temporary OAuth verifier code for an access token.

requests.name: oauth_token

responses.description: Success example using a workspace app produces a very different kind of response

requests.description: Exchanges a temporary OAuth verifier code for a workspace token.

requests.name: oauth_v2_access

responses.description: Successful token request with scopes for both a bot user and a user token

requests.description: Exchanges a temporary OAuth verifier code for an access token.

requests.name: pins_add
requests.description: Pins an item to a channel.

requests.name: pins_list
requests.description: Lists items pinned to a channel.

requests.name: pins_remove
requests.description: Un-pins an item from a channel.

requests.name: reactions_add
requests.description: Adds a reaction to an item.

requests.name: reactions_get
requests.description: Gets reactions for an item.

requests.name: reactions_list
requests.description: Lists reactions made by a user.

requests.name: reactions_remove
requests.description: Removes a reaction from an item.

requests.name: reminders_add
requests.description: Creates a reminder.

requests.name: reminders_complete
requests.description: Marks a reminder as complete.

requests.name: reminders_delete
requests.description: Deletes a reminder.

requests.description: Gets information about a reminder.

requests.name: reminders_list
requests.description: Lists all reminders created by or for a given user.

requests.name: rtm_connect
requests.description: Starts a Real Time Messaging session.

requests.name: search_messages
requests.description: Searches for messages matching a query.

requests.name: stars_add
requests.description: Adds a star to an item.

requests.name: stars_list
requests.description: Lists stars for a user.

requests.name: stars_remove
requests.description: Removes a star from an item.

requests.name: team_accessLogs

responses.description: This response demonstrates pagination and two access log entries.
A workspace must be on a paid plan to use this method, otherwise the `paid_only` error is thrown:

requests.description: Gets the access logs for the current team.

requests.description: Gets billable users information for the current team.

requests.name: team_info
requests.description: Gets information about the current team.

requests.name: team_integrationLogs
requests.description: Gets the integration logs for the current team.

requests.description: Retrieve a team's profile.

requests.description: List all users in a User Group

requests.name: users_conversations

responses.description: Typical success response with only public channels. Note how `num_members` and `is_member` are not returned like typical `conversations` objects.

requests.description: List conversations the calling user may access.

requests.name: users_deletePhoto
requests.description: Delete the user profile photo

responses.description: When requesting information for a different user, this method just returns the current presence (either `active` or `away`).

requests.name: users_identity

responses.description: You will receive at a minimum the following information:

requests.description: Get a user's identity.

requests.name: users_info
requests.description: Gets information about a user.

requests.description: Lists all users in a Slack team.

requests.description: Set the profile information for a user.

requests.description: Marked a user as active. Deprecated and non-functional.

requests.description: Set the user profile photo

requests.name: views_open

responses.description: Typical success response includes the opened view payload.
Typical error response, before getting to any possible validation errors.

requests.description: Open a view for a user.

requests.name: views_publish

responses.description: Typical success response includes the published view payload.
Typical error response, before getting to any possible validation errors.

requests.description: Publish a static view for a User.

requests.name: views_push

responses.description: Typical success response includes the pushed view payload.

requests.description: Push a view onto the stack of a root view.

requests.name: views_update

responses.description: Typical success response includes the updated view payload.

requests.description: Update an existing view.

requests.name: workflows_stepCompleted
requests.description: Indicate that an app's step in a workflow completed execution.

requests.name: workflows_stepFailed
requests.description: Indicate that an app's step in a workflow failed to execute.

requests.name: workflows_updateStep
requests.description: Update the configuration for a workflow extension step.
